11.reason: [The condition is incorrect: it checks only one side of the range (e.g., ch[i-1] >= 'a' but not <= 'z', and ch[i+1] <= 'z' but not >= 'a'), and does not ensure both characters are of the same type or that ch[i+1] > ch[i-1]. Also, accessing ch[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read.]
